mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, type, amount, category_id, account_id, to_account_id, description, frequency, day_of_week, day_of_month, month_of_year, start_date, end_date, max_count, executed_count, next_trigger_date, last_triggered_at, status, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recurring_template ( user_id, name, type, amount, category_id, account_id, to_account_id, description, frequency, day_of_week, day_of_month, month_of_year, start_date, end_date, max_count, executed_count, next_trigger_date, last_triggered_at, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{categoryId}, #{accountId}, #{toAccountId}, #{description}, #{frequency}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{dayOfMonth}, #{monthOfYear}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{maxCount}, #{executedCount}, #{nextTriggerDate}, #{lastTriggeredAt}, #{status}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM recurring_template WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT FROM recurring_template WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' AND next_trigger_date <= #{date} AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= #{date}) AND (max_count IS NULL OR executed_count < max_count) ORDER BY next_trigger_date ASC
